announcements.title: ![</>](assets/code-brackets.svg) Agentic AI Hackathon - SF
announcements.body: 8-Hour Hackathon at **AWS Builder Loft, SF** on June 5, 2026. Join us for an electrifying hackathon bringing together developers and AI enthusiasts. Sponsored by RocketRide, XTrace, vnovate, butterbase, Juspay & Photon.

announcements.title: ![RocketRide](assets/rocketride.svg) RocketRide Launch Party
announcements.body: Join us for the big **RocketRide Launch Party** on June 18, 2026 at **The Shack, San Francisco**. Come celebrate the launch with the team!

announcements.title: ![RocketRide](assets/rocketride.svg) RocketRide × MiniMax
announcements.body: RocketRide and **MiniMax** are partnering to bring the **M3** open-weights model to every pipeline. It's live today as a node in our open-source inventory — drop it in, benchmark it, and trace every step.

announcements.title: ![RocketRide](assets/rocketride.svg) Harness Engineering, Live
announcements.body: At **SCALE Demo Day**, co-founder **Joe Maionchi** built a pipeline in under 30 seconds — offline, on a 64-thread C++ runtime. RocketRide is the open AI harness you own, because it's open source.
